mnemonics.title: NETCONF Operations
mnemonics.content: Get Every Configuration Carefully - GECC: Get-config, Edit-config, Copy-config, Close-session.

mnemonics.title: NETCONF Layer Stack
mnemonics.content: The ROC Transports: Transport (bottom), RPC, Operations, Content (top). Remember layers from bottom to top like building a house: foundation first.

mnemonics.title: NETCONF vs SNMP Advantages
mnemonics.content: STV - Security (SSH mandatory), Transactions (atomic commit), Validation (YANG constraints). NETCONF wins on all three.

mnemonics.title: YANG Data Types
mnemonics.content: LLCCL - Leaf, Leaf-list, Container, Choice, List. Think 'Leaves Lightly Cover Clustered Lists' for the five YANG constructs.
